text.zh: ReAct 和 Toolformer 等研究把语言模型与外部行动、观察和 API 调用连接起来，推动了 LLM 智能体的发展。
text.en: Research such as ReAct and Toolformer connected language models with external actions, observations, and API calls, advancing LLM-based agents.

text.zh: LLM 智能体通常由规划、记忆、工具调用和结果评估组成循环，但长链路错误、权限、成本与安全仍限制其可靠自主性。
text.en: LLM agents commonly form loops around planning, memory, tool use, and result evaluation, while long-horizon errors, permissions, cost, and safety still limit reliable autonomy.
